IGUI_PZLectures_Invite: %1 invites you to a lecture on %2. You have %3 seconds to respond.
IGUI_PZLectures_LectureStartedTeacher: You are conducting a lecture on %1.
IGUI_PZLectures_LectureStartedListener: You are attending a lecture on %1.
IGUI_PZLectures_RemovedFromLecture: You left the lecture and will not receive its benefit.
IGUI_PZLectures_CancelledTeacher: The lecture was cancelled because the teacher could not continue.
IGUI_PZLectures_CancelledNoListeners: The lecture was cancelled because there were not enough listeners.
IGUI_PZLectures_Rewarded: Your %1 knowledge was raised to the lecture cap (%2).
IGUI_PZLectures_AlreadyAtCap: Your %1 knowledge is already at or above the lecture cap (%2).
IGUI_PZLectures_Error: The lecture request could not be completed.
IGUI_PZLectures_ErrorTeacherLevel: You do not have enough skill in this topic to teach the lecture.
IGUI_PZLectures_ErrorAlreadyBusy: You are already involved in another lecture.
IGUI_PZLectures_ErrorInvalidState: You cannot conduct a lecture in your current state.
IGUI_PZLectures_ErrorUnknownTopic: That lecture topic is not available.
IGUI_PZLectures_ErrorNoCandidates: There are no eligible players close enough to invite.
IGUI_PZLectures_ErrorTooFar: You are too far away from the teacher to join.
IGUI_PZLectures_RequiresMechanics: Requires Mechanics level %1. Your current level: %2.
IGUI_PZLectures_RequiresCraftingSkill: Requires level %1 in at least one Crafting skill.
